description: SilenceROM I Changelog ***Initial Release*** SilenceROM II Changelog +p2p-streams +SoundCloud  +Maintenance Tool  +OpenSubtitles.org +HD Wallpapers  -VideoDevil -50mb SilenceROM III Changelog *System fixes and tweaks  *Quality of the zip files were improved *CCM Helix skin slightly edited *Footprint of this build has been reduced SilenceROM IV Changelog *Optimized Zip *Tweaked files and CCM Helix +MetalKettles  +RobinHood-People List  SilenceROM V Changelog *V has been rebuilt from the ground up for further optimization *Cleaned up iStreams library *Footprint has further been reduced SilenceROM VI Changelog *Slight system changes +HD Wallpapers +Total Installer +Showbox *Edited CCM Helix *DigiTeli Sports links updated +Live Links to favourites menu SilenceROM VII Changelog -Favourites live links -Removed Mac OS X hidden files -5mb *Cleaned up system files *Adjusted various XML Settings SilenceROM VIII Changelog No changes from VII.  Initially I uploaded two different builds of VII on accident.  So that everyone is on the same build I changed the name to 008 SilenceROM IX Changelog *Slight Change to CCM Helix  +FTV Guide Repo +FTV Guide *Configured FTV Guide with working channels. NOTE: ApexROM does not yet support Library Integration. *CCM / CCM Helix adjustments *XML tweaks *New Favourites Setup *Tweaked Super Favourites *Tweaked Viewmodes *Tweaked Playlist Loader *Tweaked iVue / FTV Guides  *Updated Repositories  SilenceROM XXX Changelog *Rebuilt from the ground up and tested for errors *Source Tweaks *Super Favourites Tweaks *XML Optimization *ZIP Optimization *Footprint of build has been reduced *iVue Guide Tweaks -F.T.V NOTE: FilmOn channels still available from Favourites menu -Super Repo NOTE: Still possible to install via File Manager SilenceROM XXXI Changelog *Milestone Release *Optimization overhaul  *IPTV Stalker now loads up instantly *Updated Applications *Wallpaper Optimization  *Improved Favourites Menu *Tweaked Super Favourites *Tweaked Viewmodes *Zip Optimization *Footprint has been further reduced NOTE: Only 180mb download! +New SilenceROM Startup Animation  -57MB SilenceROM XXXII Changelog *XML Optimization *Updated Wallpaper quality from 720p to 1080p *Tweaked Favorites Menu *New public account for US TV *Tweaked default Confluence skin settings *Modified Source file +CCM SilenceROM XXXII Skin +Prozone IPTV Source -CCM Helix Skin -Icefilms SilenceROM XXXIII Changelog *Modifications to CCM SilenceROM *Fixed US TV account *Modified source file *Viewmode tweaks *IPTV Stalker tweaks *Footprint reduced +Scripts for CCM SilenceROM SilenceROM XXXIV Changelog *Tweaked Super Favourites  *Turned off SilenceROM Intro Movie. NOTE: Can be turned on via Skin Settings/Scripts. -Mega Reborn -Sparky Streams [DEAD] SilenceROM XXXV Changelog *Milestone Release *Full native library integration support for Genesis, Primewire, and User added Libraries.  *Tweaked Super Favourites *CCM SilenceROM Adjustments *Modified source file *Tweaked Playlist loader *Tweaked Viewmodes *XML Optimization  +Scripts in the line below. +Artist slideshow, artwork downloader, grabart, favourites, tvtunes, simple playlist, tv shows aired next, and widget +Husham Lists -Axel Downloader SilenceROM XXXVI Changelog *Library tweaks; SilenceROM now natively supports "iStream" Library along with Genesis, Primwire, and user libraries.  *All new Favourites Menu now contains options for updating, exporting, cleaning, and browsing libraries.  *Viewmode adjustments for Primewire, iStream, and Genesis. *Turned sound back on *CCM SilenceROM adjustments +Cartoon 8 -Funnier Moments SilenceROM XXXVII Changelog *CCM SilenceROM adjustments *Tweaked Super Favourites  *Tweaked Favourites menu -Vdubt25 SilenceROM XXXVII Changelog *Wallpaper tweak *Bugfix in the gui  SilenceROM XXXIX & ApexROM VII Changelog *Dual Release *Updated applications *ApexROM is now on par with SilenceROM; but not compatible with home screen widgets. ApexROM VIII or ApexROM Hybrid Changelog *Milestone Release *Complete overhaul of the build  *Native library support for Genesis, Primewire, iStream, Music Videos, and user libraries. *ApexROM now exceeded SilenceROM in features. *New look and feel with the same ease of use. *New widget system integrated with ApexROM Hybrid skin. *Footprint has been reduced *XML Optimization *Zip Optimization *Dependencies Optimization *Tweaked view modes *Tweaked Playlist loader *Tweaked source file *Tweaked Favourites menu -CCM ApexROM skin +ApexROM Hybrid skin ApexROM IX Hybrid Changelog *Changed Focus tab to Movies *Modified ApexROM Hybrid skin *Tweaked Viewmodes *Tweaked XML files *Fixed YouTube bug ApexROM X Hybrid Changelog *Tweaked Viewmodes +Classic Mode profile which lets you run ApexROM in the old CCM ApexROM skin. +CCM ApexROM skin SilenceROM XL Hybrid Changelog ***Notable Milestone Release*** *SilenceROM is now a Tri skinned community build. 1. CCM SilenceROM 2. Hybrid SilenceROM 3. Confluence ! Users may install any skin of their choosing during the installation process. ! Alternatively skins can easily be switched on the fly via “System” tab then /Appearance/Skin/.  ! The Hybrid SilenceROM skin is recommended. It’s also the most feature rich with a huge variety of options.  *PVR IPTV Simple Client is now preconfigured with IPTV Stalker for “channels” and iVue’s TV Guide for “EPG”; 680 channels in all. ! NOTE: Due to Community Build’s add-on installation process this feature is turned off by default. ! Please turn this feature on directly after a complete install of SilenceROM XL. Here are the following steps… 1. Navigate to select the “System” tab. 2. Scroll down and select the option “Live TV”. 3. You should now be on the top option called “General” to the right of it select “Enable”. 4. Your PVR should begin to import it’s channels and epg within five seconds. It should take another five seconds to finish. ! If your PVR has not started or your system has asked you to choose a client please select IPTV Simple Client and hit enable. ! If your system has not automatically brought you to the PVR section of Add-ons. It’s located in System/Add-ons/Disabled Add-ons/PVR/ *Full native library integration for Genesis, Primewire, iStream, Music Videos, Concerts, Audio Music, and custom user added libraries. ! To add a custom user library please insert your media or stream files into the following directory of the build.   userdata/Library/ ! In that directory of userdata/Library/ You will find various folders. Just place your media in the corresponding folders. ! Afterwards be sure to navigate to the Favourites menu by pressing down three times on Hybrid or the star on the lower left in CCM. ! Once in the Favourites menu select “SilenceROM’s Library Updater feature” and your media should appear on the home screen. ! To uninstall media from the library. Be sure after deleting the files to navigate to the Favourites menu and select the “SilenceROM Library Cleaner” option. (REMOVED: This was the reason why TR Community Builds wasn't installing correctly on Android.  #####*Keymapping now enabled. By default library search has been preassigned to the “spacebar” key for ease of use. #####! Keymap Editor can be found in the “Addons” tab on the home screen.) *Three radio stream channels have added to the Favourites menu. 1. Monte Carlo RMC 1 Network TV 2. Virgin Radio Network TV 3. Radio 105 Network TV ! These music video channels play hit music in various different languages including English, Spanish, and Italian.  ! Can be minimized to a widget for home screen browsing. *Volume amplification; the build now has a 30% increase in sound. ! This can be manually changed via options screen during video or audio playback. *Improved Disk Media support preconfigured with AAC encoder for ripping. ! Note might be turned off by default due to Community Builds Add-on install process. *SilenceROM now uses Archive.org for it’s host due to high volume of users. *Skin home screen adjustments *Slight wallpaper modifications *Improved visuals on all skins *XBMCtorrent now works for Android, Mac, and PC. *XML tweaks *Scripts tweaks *Database tweaks *Viewmode tweaks *Favourites menu tweaks *Source file tweaks *Applications updated *Footprint has been increased greatly due to having multiple skins. However SilenceROM is highly optimized all the way around. +Extendedinfo Script +youtube-dl Control +Keymap Editor +Hybrid SilenceROM skin -FTV Guide -FTV Guide Repo -USTVnow account. Due to high volume of users USTV has banned account. NOTE: Just create your own account it’s FREE! SilenceROM XLI Changelog *Dual Skin Build  ! CCM SilenceROM is the default. Hybrid SilenceROM can be switched at anytime after installation.  *Rebuild from the ground up *Improved stability  *Optimized ZIP *Optimized XML *Optimized CCM SilenceROM skin *Optimized Dependencies  *Optimized Database *Tweaked Super Favourites NOTE: Added Music Favs *Tweaked viewmodes *Tweaked Favourites menu *Tweaked XBMC Torrents *Reduced footprint NOTE: All this stuff in under 200mb :) *Tweaked PVR Client ! Note to get PVR client to work do the following steps (NEW METHOD) 1. Navigate to "System" tab. 2. Select Live TV. 3. In the General tab of Live TV settings click on "Enable". 4. It will ask to select a PRV Client, please select "IPTV Simple Client". 5. Select the "Enable" option and press back "twice" so that your back on the Live TV General options. 6. Now you must select "Disable". 7. Then you must select "Enable" again from the same tab. 8. It will ask you to select your client again.  9. Like before select "IPTV Simple Client" and then select "Enable" 10. Now you should see your PRV being updated.   -iStreams and everything that comes with it including "Beatbox" and "Kizzer" playlist NOTE: Can be reinstalled easy. ! If a user desires iStream please go to the Xunity Talk Repository, then go to services and select .Xunity Talk Extensions. -TVtunes -Extendedinfo Script -youtube-dl Control -Artwork Downloader -Artist slideshow -TV shows aired next +Lazy TV +Free Streams +Tunein Radio SilenceROM XLI U1 Changelog *Minor Update 1 *updated settings for LazyTV  *Key-mapped Library Search to spacebar and LazyTV to the L button. -AAA LiveTV because it's dead right now. -Removed Simple Playlist SilenceROM XLII Changelog *Community Request Edition  ! I have added some of the requested apps and features of SilenceROM users *CCM, Hybrid, and Confluence Adjustments *Tweaked Super Favourites *Tweaked Favourites Menu ! Cartoons and Movies now have Favs *Tweaked Various XML’s *Tweaked Viewmodes ! Mac, Android, Windows, iOS, and Linux should all have the same view modes. *Tweaked Lazy TV *Tweaked iVue TV Guide *Library Source Files ! Full native library support for Genesis, Primewire, iStream, Salts, Mutts, Music, Music Videos, and user Libraries. +Zeus Repo +Zeus +Funnier Moments +Stream All Sources +Beatbox Stream Engine +The Mutts Nuts +Apple iTunes Podcast SilenceROM XLIII Changelog *Minor Update *SilenceROM can now be updated without losing libraries, or user data, or subscriptions etc. *Tweaked viewmodes *Tweaked Super Favourites ! Added many more options for each Favs section -Removed the library widgets on CCM skin. NOTE: Just use Hybrid skin if you want this. ! The widgets can be added via System/Skin/Home Menu or again Just use Hybrid Skin which is widget based. +Comic Strips +Concert Archive SilenceROM XLIV Changelog *Minor nightly update (update not required, testing purposes) *Tweaked XML's *Updated Applications -Optimization on ZIP (Testing) SilenceROM XLV Changelog *Minor Update *Tweaked PRV Client ! Better EPG SilenceROM XLVI Changelog *Minor update *Updated Applications +SilenceROM Info SilenceROM XLVII Changelog *Legendary Status *Built from new improved base & tool set *Improved speed *Improved stability  *Optimized ZIP Compression *Optimized XML's *Optimized CCM SilenceROM skin *Optimized Hybrid SilenceROM skin *Optimized Dependencies  *Optimized Databases *Optimized all installed add-ons *Tweaked Super Favourites *Tweaked Favourites menu *Tweaked viewmodes *Tweaked Favourites menu *Tweaked iVue *Tweaked wallpapers *Tweaked keymaps *Tweaked widgets *Applications updated  !Every add-on, shortcut, repo, etc confirmed working! -Removed all pre compiled Python byte codes !Eliminited *.pyo *.pyc files compiled by Python +channel Pear +Cliq! +Mega Reborn +NBA Full Games +NJM Soccer +Vdubt25 +VEVO +Mikey's Karaoke +TotalRevolution +RSS Editor +Blazetamer's Repo +Dixie-Dean's Repo +Homeless Repo +Mucky Ducks Repo +natko 1412 Repo +podgod Repo +whufclee Repo SilenceROM XLVIII Changelog *Minor Update *SilenceROM is now compatible with Aeon Nox skin ! Must download Aeon Nox skin separate but once downloaded everything is preconfigured.  *Tweaked Viewmodes *Tweaked XML's *Keymap Changes ! Library Search now moved to Q and SilenceROM Info now changed to W *CCM adjustments *Database adjustments *Updated applications  SilenceROM XLIX Changelog *Removed empty library folders; users should now know how to add their own libraries. Check post 1 for details. *Decreased overall footprint; only 226Mb in size! Including two skins! *CCM & Hybrid adjustments & tweaks *Better compatibility with Aeon Nox *Major Database optimizations *Tweaked Super Favourites +Aeon Nox dependencies  +UK Turk Live Streams +Tecbox iVue Wizard +Food Network +NFL Teams +VPNicity +UFC -Splash Screen SilenceROM 'L' engendary Changelog *CCM & Hybrid adjustments, tweaks, and fixes *Aeon Nox preconfigured tweaks *Cleaned up scripts *Decreased foot print *Database Tweaks -Community Builds  -Total Revolution -Total Installer +Total Installer 2.0 All in one SilenceROM LI Changelog *Aeon Nox preconfigured tweaks *Updated applications *Tweaked source file *Super Favourites Tweaks *New Favourites Menu  *Cleaned XML's +ChicagoIPTV +Lihat LiveTV +Qlock Screensaver SilenceROM LII Changelog *SilenceROM now can be installed via Wizard ! I made the wizard from whufclee's original code. Thanks whufclee! ! Benefit of installing via wizard; preconfigured system settings. ! This is not possible with Community Builds "at the moment". *New Favourites Menu *Tweaked Database *Tweaked Super Favourites *Tweaked source file +SilenceROM Wizard +SportsAccess -Prozone IPTV SilenceROM LIII Changelog *CCM/Hybrid/Nox Adjustments *Tweaked Super Favourites *Updated source file *Updated applications *Updated SilenceROM Wizard *Tweaked Database +TorrentRelease Repo +Renegades TV Guide :Preconfigured +Dragon Streams +DubStop SilenceROM LIV Changelog *Updated SilenceROM Wizard ! Added SilenceROM LIV build 54 to the Wizard and removed older builds. Extra Configuration includes = View and show hidden files: enabled = Update all libraries on boot = Grouping of libraries box sets: enabled = Qlock screensaver: enabled = Extra album information for music libraries = Volume Amplification set to 30% increase = Can also be used to repair all settings incase user breaks something. *Completed Renegade TV Guide configuration ! Added extra Channels for USA/UK TV guide ! You now have a decent backup when IPTV Stalker which is linked to iVue/PVR goes offline. *Updated applications SilenceROM LVI Changelog *Updated applications *CCM/Hybrid/Aeon ajustments *Modified source file *Tweaked Playlist Loader *Updated both New and Old Wizard to run Latest SilenceROM *Preconfigured FTV Guide with US & UK Channels *Simple IPTV Client now preconfigured with XMLTV !
